Petition To Vacate Order For Final Distribution And Issue Corrected Order Of Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (66 Cleary Court #503 San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for administrator Debra Dolch. Sale is confirmed at $641,000.00. No additional bond is required. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: S. Mann.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (66 Cleary Court #503 San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Continued To Sep-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for administrator Debra Dolch. Proof of Posting is not completed. Court is shortening time to five days for posting. Matter is continued to 9/4. Counsel will prepare an OST.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.

Petition For Attorneys' Fee And Costs Incurred In The Initiation Fo The Estate Of H.L. Kraft.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Patrick Talbot Hall appearing for Mark Rose. Monica Dell'osso appearing for Leonard Kraft, James Kraft and Mary Peltzer. Because of the conflict, court is appointing Debra Dolch as teh administrator. Bond is fixed in the amount of $1,100,000.00. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2006 Continued To Mar-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Monica Dell'osso appearing for Leonard Kraft. Patrick Talbot Hall appearing with and for petitioner. The petition to appoint Debra Dolch as the administrator is continued to 3/8. Mr. Hall wants to go forward with his petition. Court is continuing his petition to 3/8. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
